name: luke-notion
description: Task and meeting workflow skills for Collin's canonical Notion workspace. MCP-first: uses Claude.ai's hosted Notion connector for most operations plus a bundled single-tool MCP server for exhaustive data-source queries that exceed the hosted cap.

NOTION_TOKEN.title: Notion API Token
NOTION_TOKEN.description: Bearer token (starts with ntn_) used by the bundled MCP server for paginated queries past the hosted MCP's 100-row cap. Create at https://www.notion.so/my-integrations and connect it to the canonical DBs via each DB's ••• → Connections.
